title: Keep the marketing execution board aligned with current handoff and scheduled-follow-through state
summary: Patched the execution-board generator so it stops advertising already-delivered curator manual-contact packets as fresh work and surfaces the exact scheduled StackOverflow run time instead of a vague cooldown note. Then regenerated the live board and refreshed directory-listing proof.

outcome.execution_board_removed_false_action: Curator manual-contact packet is no longer shown as 'Do now' after the packet was already delivered in the current review window.
outcome.execution_board_added_exact_schedule: StackOverflow demand-capture packet now shows Scheduled for 2026-05-24T11:30:00+02:00.
